# Assessment Overview

This index links to supplementary assessment artifacts generated for this report.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level and component-level architecture diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency inventory grouped by modernization-relevant categories.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Controller/API surface, contracts, and communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, ER diagram, and data ownership boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, properties, and sensitive settings inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core business workflows, domain mapping, and workflow sequence diagram.
